name: CumulusMgpFinancialPlans
label: Cumulus MGP Financial Plans
description: MoneyGuidePro / eMoney / NaviPlan-style synthetic financial-plan dataset per Wealth Management account per month. Federated from FINS.PUBLIC.MGP_FINANCIAL_PLANS via Snowflake Direct_Access. ACCOUNT_ID FKs to ssot__Account__dlm. PLAN_STATUS gates LAST_REVIEW_DATE / NEXT_REVIEW_DATE NULLability.

fields.name: ssot__AccountId
fields.label: Account ID
fields.description: Salesforce Account ID. FK to ssot__Account__dlm.ssot__Id__c.

fields.name: profileMonth
fields.label: Profile Month
fields.description: First-of-month for the run; PK (DC collapses composite to single-column).

fields.name: planStatus
fields.label: Plan Status
fields.description: Active (~80%), Draft (~12%), Stale (~8%). Gates review-date NULLs.

fields.name: planLastUpdatedDate
fields.label: Plan Last Updated Date
fields.description: When the plan was last touched. ≤ today.

fields.name: monthlyIncomeTargetUsd
fields.label: Monthly Income Target (USD)
fields.description: 70-90% replacement of pre-retirement annual income, monthly. Range [10K,200K].

fields.name: totalGoalAmountUsd
fields.label: Total Goal Amount (USD)
fields.description: Sum of all goal amounts. Range [500K,50M].

fields.name: monteCarloSuccessPct
fields.label: Monte Carlo Success %
fields.description: Monte Carlo simulation success probability. Range [30.0,99.0].

fields.name: recommendedAssetAllocation
fields.label: Recommended Asset Allocation
fields.description: Conservative / Moderate Conservative / Moderate / Moderate Aggressive / Aggressive.

fields.name: lastReviewDate
fields.label: Last Review Date
fields.description: Date of last advisor review. NULL when planStatus=Draft.

fields.name: nextReviewDate
fields.label: Next Review Date
fields.description: Scheduled next review. NULL when planStatus=Stale.

fields.name: advisorNotesFlag
fields.label: Advisor Notes Flag
fields.description: True if advisor has logged free-text notes on the plan.

fields.name: generatedAt
fields.label: Generated At
fields.description: Run timestamp (UTC). Month-bucketed for byte-identical mid-month re-runs.
